summary: Hide page overlays by default and place developer controls in an active-camera advanced mode.
scope: Hide the pinch cursor and hand mesh by default.
Add persistent developer switches for the mesh and cursor.
Show advanced controls only after the camera starts.
validation: Static controller layout inspection at 300x350 and 300x640
notes: The two developer overlays are intentionally opt-in and local-only.
The verified test page for this project is http://127.0.0.1:4173/gesture-test.html.
